top3.sql:
WITH driver_year_points AS (
    SELECT 
        r.year,
        d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS driver_full_name,
        SUM(ds.points) AS total_points
    FROM driver_standings ds
    JOIN drivers d ON ds.driver_id = d.driver_id
    JOIN races r ON ds.race_id = r.race_id
    GROUP BY r.year, d.forename || ' ' || d.surname
),
constructor_year_points AS (
    SELECT 
        r.year,
        c.name AS constructor_name,
        SUM(cr.points) AS total_points
    FROM constructor_results cr
    ...

WITH driver_points_per_year AS (
    SELECT 
        r.year,
        d.forename,
        d.surname,
        SUM(ds.points) AS total_points
    FROM driver_standings ds
    JOIN races r ON ds.race_id = r.race_id
    JOIN drivers d ON ds.driver_id = d.driver_id
    GROUP BY r.year, d.forename, d.surname
),
top_driver_per_year AS (
    SELECT 
        year,
        forename,
        surname,
        total_points,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY year ORDER BY total_points DESC) AS rn
    FRO...

WITH driver_points AS (
    SELECT 
        r.year,
        d.driver_id,
        d.forename,
        d.surname,
        d.full_name,
        SUM(ds.points) AS total_points
    FROM driver_standings ds
    JOIN races r ON ds.race_id = r.race_id
    JOIN drivers_ext d ON ds.driver_id = d.driver_id
    GROUP BY r.year, d.driver_id, d.forename, d.surname, d.full_name
),
top_driver_per_year AS (
    SELECT 
        year,
        driver_id,
        full_name,
        total_points,
        ROW_NUMBER()...
